alkylation reagent: treated (RT, 30 mins) in the dark with iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: beads were incubated in sequencing grade trypsin solution
enrichment method: for subsequent streptavidin-based enrichment and analysis by quantitative mass spectrometry
instrument: run on a Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer
labeling: were labeled with tandem mass tags (TMT) for quantitative MS-based proteomics
reduction reagent: with 50 μL 1:1 solution of 20 mM TCEP (PBS)
reduction concentration: with 50 μL 1:1 solution of 20 mM TCEP (PBS)
